title: Mizuno's Pig Variants
description: A texture pack for Variants Pig Mizuno Craft16
body:
![Mizuno Pig Variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f83d6c0bdd70e3f6fff483e1c91770378481de7_0.webp)

A texture packs for Mizuno Craft16.

Showcase

Required:

> [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) > Fabric [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) ``` This texture can also work in vanilla. ```
**All of my Mizuno's addons** - [Mizuno Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizuno-better-leaves) - [Unofficial Mizuno's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unofficial-mizunos) -
